inputs.label: Product Category
inputs.businessContext: CBAM product categories as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956.

inputs.label: Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Annual production volume of the product in metric tonnes.

inputs.label: Embedded Emissions
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in the product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent per tonne of product. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

inputs.label: Carbon Price in Origin Country
inputs.businessContext: Effective carbon price paid in the country of origin (e.g., via carbon tax or ETS).

inputs.label: CBAM Certificate Price
inputs.businessContext: Price of CBAM certificates, based on EU ETS allowance auction price.

inputs.label: Free Allowance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the sector. Based on EU ETS benchmarks.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level of the input data; affects adjustment of results.

thresholds.carbonPriceOrigin: if carbonPriceOrigin < 10 then 'Low carbon price in origin'

formulas.dataConfidenceAdjusted: if dataConfidence == 'low' then additionalCostDueToCBAM * 1.2 else if dataConfidence == 'medium' then additionalCostDueToCBAM * 1.05 else additionalCostDueToCBAM

suggestedActions: Reduce embedded emissions through process optimization or cleaner energy sources.
Increase carbon price paid in origin country to reduce CBAM liability.
Apply for free allowances if eligible.
